pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the Director of Data Science, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.475) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.475). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Science versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Science.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.475. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Data Science.
